category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides automatic workarounds for Wine; official GitHub README says Winetricks works around problems in Wine, installs missing DLLs, and tweaks Wine settings.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Winetricks; source_facts.name is winetricks.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installing, updating, custom verb files, tests, and support; repository navigation includes an official wiki.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Winetricks/winetricks, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Wine workarounds; official GitHub README documents supported applications, missing DLL installation, Wine setting tweaks, and command-line installation/update usage.
